description_long: This is a robust, classical-style stone drinking fountain mounted on a square, octagonal-tiled base. The fountain features a central cylindrical pedestal supporting a round basin, with a smaller, elevated bowl at the top and a metal spout protruding from the upper section. There is a secondary, lower drinking bowl integrated into the pedestal, likely intended for pets or accessibility. The stonework is engraved with text, and the overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, with subtle decorative molding around the basin and pedestal. The surface appears weathered, suggesting outdoor installation, and the structure is solid and heavy, typical of public urban amenities. The fountain is designed for durability and frequent use in parks or city squares.
description: A heavy stone drinking fountain with a round basin, upper spout, and integrated lower bowl, set on an octagonal-tiled base. It features engraved text and subtle classical detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main drinking spout, upper bowl, and engraved text on the pedestal, with the lower bowl clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lower bowl's opening and more of the engraved text, with the spout partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the upper bowl and spout, with the lower bowl less prominent and the pedestal's shape clear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side of the pedestal and basin, with no spout or lower bowl visible.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features engraved text on the pedestal and subtle classical moldings around the basin and base. The design is simple yet elegant, with no elaborate sculptures or motifs.
attribute_basin_structure: The main basin is round with a slightly raised rim, supported by a cylindrical pedestal. There is a smaller, secondary bowl integrated into the lower part of the pedestal, likely for pets or accessibility.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: A single metal spout projects from the upper bowl, designed for a straightforward, downward water flow with no visible jets or decorative spray patterns.
